sqlMap.delete: /*BudgetComm.deleteDgrcompo*/ DELETE FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.insert: /*BudgetComm.insertDgrcompofrsc*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , FRSC_FG_CD , DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT , PRE_FRSC_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teBgtCompoId# , #frscFgCd# , (SELECT NVL(#dmnDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#adjDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#preDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#preFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_FRSC_AMT) , #teBgtCompoSeq# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update: /*BudgetComm.updateDgrcompofrsc*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC SET DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT = NVL(#dmnDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT = NVL(#adjDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT = NVL(#preDefFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_FRSC_AMT = NVL(#preFrscAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND FRSC_FG_CD = #frscFgCd#
sqlMap.delete: /*BudgetComm.deleteDgrcompofrsc*/ DELETE FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.insert: /*BudgetComm.insertDgrcompochar*/ INSERT INTO TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR( FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR , TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , CHAR_FG_CD , DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT , PRE_CHAR_AMT , TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#fisYear# , #bgtDgr# , #teBgtCompoId# , #charFgCd# , (SELECT NVL(#dmnDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#adjDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#preDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT) , (SELECT NVL(#preCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) AS PRE_CHAR_AMT) , #teBgtCompoSeq# , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update: /*BudgetComm.updateDgrcompochar*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR SET DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT = NVL(#dmnDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT = NVL(#adjDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT = NVL(#preDefCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , PRE_CHAR_AMT = NVL(#preCharAmt#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# AND CHAR_FG_CD = #charFgCd#
sqlMap.delete: /*BudgetComm.deleteDgrcompochar*/ DELETE FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.select: /*BudgetComm.selectUpDgrcompoInfo*/ SELECT FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ FROM TB_DGRCOMPO WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.update: /*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompoAmtAll*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET (DEMAND_BGT_AMT, DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, BGT_AMT, PRE_AMT, DIFF_AMT, PRE_BGT_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z.DEMAND_BGT_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.BGT_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_BGT_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = #compoLevel# )

/*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompofrscAmtAll*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A SET (DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, PRE_FRSC_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z2.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_FRSC_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z1 , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = Z1.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z2.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = #compoLevel# )

/*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompocharAmtAll*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A SET (DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, PRE_CHAR_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z2.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_CHAR_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z1 , TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = Z1.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z2.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z1.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = #compoLevel# )

/*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompoAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET (DEMAND_BGT_AMT, DEMAND_DIFF_AMT, BGT_AMT, PRE_AMT, DIFF_AMT, PRE_BGT_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.DEMAND_DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_AMT), 0) + NVL(SUM(Z.DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.DIFF_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z.PRE_BGT_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompofrscAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A SET (DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, PRE_FRSC_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z2.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_FRSC_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z1 , TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = Z1.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z2.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z1.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.updateUpDgrcompocharAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A SET (DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT, ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, PRE_CHAR_AMT) = (SELECT NVL(SUM(Z2.DMN_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT), 0) , NVL(SUM(Z2.PRE_CHAR_AMT), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z1 , TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR Z2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z2.FIS_YEAR = Z1.FIS_YEAR AND Z2.BGT_DGR = Z1.BGT_DGR AND Z2.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = Z1.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z2.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD AND Z1.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z1.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z1.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId# ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompoPreBgtAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET (PRE_BGT_AMT, PRE_COMP_FORMULAR) = (SELECT NVL(Z.BGT_AMT, 0), NVL(Z.COMP_FORMULAR, '') FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompofrscPreFrscAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A SET PRE_FRSC_AMT = (SELECT NVL(Z.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) + NVL(Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompocharPreCharAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A SET PRE_CHAR_AMT = (SELECT NVL(Z.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0) + NVL(Z.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# AND Z.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompoPreBgtAmtAdd*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO A SET (PRE_AMT, PRE_FORMULAR, PRE_BGT_AMT, PRE_COMP_FORMULAR) = (SELECT NVL(Z.BGT_AMT, 0), NVL(Z.COMP_FORMULAR, ''), NVL(Z.PRE_BGT_AMT, 0), NVL(Z.PRE_COMP_FORMULAR , '') FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompofrscPreFrscAmtAdd*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC A SET (PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, PRE_FRSC_AMT) = (SELECT (NVL(Z.PRE_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0) + NVL(Z.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), PRE_FRSC_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# AND Z.FRSC_FG_CD = A.FRSC_FG_CD ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#

/*BudgetComm.copyDgrcompocharPreCharAmtAdd*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR A SET (PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, PRE_CHAR_AMT) = (SELECT (NVL(Z.PRE_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0) + NVL(Z.ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT, 0)), PRE_CHAR_AMT FROM TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR Z WHERE 1 = 1 AND Z.FIS_YEAR = #srcFisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #srcBgtDgr# AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #srcTeBgtCompoId# AND Z.CHAR_FG_CD = A.CHAR_FG_CD ) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND A.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
/*BudgetComm.updateDgrcompoDiffAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPO SET DIFF_AMT = 0 , BGT_AMT = PRE_AMT WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
/*BudgetComm.updateDgrcompofrscDiffAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC SET ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT = 0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
/*BudgetComm.updateDgrcompocharDiffAmt*/ UPDATE TB_DGRCOMPOCHAR SET ADJ_DEF_CHAR_AMT = 0 WHERE 1 = 1 AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
